codeReview.summary: The worker correctly aligned the ETH exchange-rates parity expectations and regenerated replay/diff artifacts, but the handoff references the wrong commit and the feature does not introduce or verify any implementation that actually reduces the /global or /exchange_rates breadth gap; it only relies on pre-existing divergence-registry entries to classify those findings as expected.

issues.description: The handoff records commitId `290f4241f62d12c740db2e1eb990c08d68d6ad46`, but `git show` proves that commit is the earlier exchange-payload feature (`fix: enrich exchange payload fidelity`) and does not contain this feature's test/artifact-only edits. The review target is therefore not traceable to the implementation being claimed.

The feature claims to convert the remaining canonical /global and /exchange_rates breadth gaps into expected divergence, but the registry entries `expected-exchange-rates-envelope-breadth` and `expected-global-breadth-gap` were already present before this worker ran and were merely consumed by regenerated artifacts. Because no new divergence-registry change or breadth implementation landed, the feature does not actually deliver the requested breadth reduction/classification work beyond updating expectations.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The compatibility-hardening skill says these features should run `bun run test` and, when replay/report behavior changes, manually verify a canonical flow against the validation API on port 3102. The transcript only ran scoped parity tests plus replay/report generation and then inspected generated JSON artifacts; there is no evidence of the required full-suite run or any manual 3102 curl verification.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for worker session `b151fe81-0511-4a39-a553-791fdcd3a22d` shows `bun test tests/global-parity.test.ts tests/exchange-rates-parity.test.ts tests/parity-improvement-gate.test.ts`, `bun run typecheck`, `bun run coingecko:replay:offline`, and `bun run coingecko:report:diff`, but no `bun run test` and no live HTTP/curl command against port 3102; compare with `.factory/skills/compatibility-hardening-worker/SKILL.md` steps 8-9.

summary: Fail: the worker updated the ETH exchange-rates parity expectation and regenerated replay/diff artifacts, but the recorded commit is unrelated to this feature and the claimed /global + /exchange_rates breadth classification work was already present in the divergence registry rather than introduced here.
